companies.name: Saurabh Food Products Pvt. Ltd.
companies.description: Located in south Nepal’s Birgunj, Saurabh Food Products Pvt. Ltd. is dedicated towards providing Nepal with highest quality rice products. The facility houses world-class modern equipment and machinery sourced from Satake in Japan, with a processing capacity of 200MT per day as well as a drying and steaming facility to facilitate the production of Basmati rice and par-boiled rice. Over and above this, Saurabh Food Products Pvt. Ltd. is also involved in the production of Mustard Oil, with a crushing capacity of 100 TPD.

companies.name: Gyan
companies.description: A brand of food products including Chakki Atta, Maida, Multigrain Atta, Maize Flour, Premium Lito baby food, Rice Flour, Millet Flour, Buckwheat Flour, Chana Besan, Maize Daliya, Wheat Daliya, Sattu, Pizza Maida, and various tea products.

companies.name: Aashirvaad
companies.description: A brand of food products including Wheat Daliya, Chickpea Flour (Ashirvaad), Suji, and Long Grain Rice.

companies.name: Vikas Food Products Pvt. Ltd.
companies.description: Located in western Nepal’s Nepalgunj, Vikas Flour Mill Pvt. Ltd. houses a production capacity of 150 tonnes per day for Mill flour, 100 tonnes per day for Wheat Aata, 100 tonnes per day for Rice, 48 tonnes per day for Blended Baby Food, and 24 tonnes per day for Wheat Flour. While the products have established a reputed name in Nepal, its Chakki Aata has also gained a wide preference in UAE, Singapore, and China.

companies.name: Vikas Flour Mill Pvt. Ltd.
companies.description: Located in western Nepal’s Nepalgunj, Vikas Flour Mill Pvt. Ltd. houses a production capacity of 150 tonnes per day for Mill flour, 100 tonnes per day for Wheat Aata, 100 tonnes per day for Rice, 48 tonnes per day for Blended Baby Food, and 24 tonnes per day for Wheat Flour.

companies.name: Swastik Oil Industries Pvt. Ltd.
companies.description: Located in south east Nepal’s Biratnagar, Swastik Oil Industries Pvt. Ltd.’s factory is based on Swedish technology for Alfa Laval. Since it began in 1989, it has earned its identity as Nepal’s biggest company in the oil manufacturing sector–with a manufacturing capacity of 450 tonnes per day and crushing capacity of 100 TPD of mustard seeds aiding the production of micro-filtered Mustard Seed Oil.

companies.name: Swastik Vanaspati Ghee
companies.description: A brand of vanaspati ghee manufactured by Swastik Oil Industries Pvt. Ltd.

companies.name: Swastik Soyabean Oil
companies.description: A brand of soyabean oil manufactured by Swastik Oil Industries Pvt. Ltd. It is the first plant in Nepal to receive the HACCP certification and introduce Vitamin A and D fortification in Soybean Oil under Swastik Health.

companies.name: Dhara Health Sunflower Oil
companies.description: A brand of sunflower oil manufactured by Swastik Oil Industries Pvt. Ltd.

companies.name: Sunflow Sunflower Oil
companies.description: A brand of sunflower oil manufactured by Swastik Oil Industries Pvt. Ltd.

companies.name: Bigul
companies.description: A mustard oil brand manufactured by Swastik Oil Industries Pvt. Ltd.

companies.name: Saurabh Oil & Agro Industries
companies.description: Located in Nepalgunj, the facility houses a modern and advanced processing plant with a capacity of 100 MT per day and also includes Color Sorter, which helps the brand in manufacturing the best quality pulses. In addition, it is also credited to be the first fully automated oil mill in the country and a leading mustard seed oil producer in Nepal.

companies.name: Dhara
companies.description: The largest selling oil brand in the country, producing high-quality mustard oil.

companies.name: Swastik Mustard Oil
companies.description: A mustard oil brand manufactured by Saurabh Oil & Agro Industries.

companies.name: United Cements Ltd.
companies.description: Located in Village Jugedi in Dhading district, United Cement boasts of the modern, state-of-the-art infrastructure that represents the synergy between sustainability and advancement. The facility is equipped with advanced dry process and five-stage preheating technology, as well as the latest available pollution-control equipment–therefore, ensuring that the large-scale production of cement, notably 1200 tonnes per day, and the process of clinkerization doesn’t come at the cost of environmental damage.

companies.name: Gyan Ventures
companies.description: Introducing Gyan Ventures, a dynamic addition to the KLDG family. As the official distributor for Mövenpick Ice Cream and Mövenpick Fine Foods, Gyan Ventures brings the exquisite flavors of Switzerland to Nepal.

companies.name: Mövenpick Ice Cream
companies.description: Movenpick Ice Cream is exclusively produced in a single factory worldwide, located in Switzerland. Both the ice-creams and sorbets are made using only natural ingredients.

companies.name: Mövenpick Fine Food
companies.description: A brand of fine foods distributed by Gyan Ventures, offering premium coffee products and hazelnut creams that are 100% palm oil free and made from whole roasted hazelnuts.

companies.name: Amul
companies.description: A brand distributed by Gyan Ventures, offering a range of products including chocolates, syrups, flavored milk, lassi, and butter milk.

companies.name: Choco Delight Pvt. Ltd.
companies.description: Welcome to Choco Delight, your passport to chocolate paradise, proudly based in the heart of Nepal. As a homegrown brand, we embody the spirit of our vibrant culture while delivering quality that competes with international standards.

companies.name: Chokolati
companies.description: A brand under Choco Delight Pvt. Ltd. offering chocolate slabs, compound slabs, and compound chips.

companies.name: Coco Joy
companies.description: A brand under Choco Delight Pvt. Ltd. offering Chocolate Hazelnut & Milk Duo Spread and Chocolate Hazelnut Spread.

companies.name: Bloomm & Beans Pvt. Ltd.
companies.description: Bloomm & Beans is a premium specialty coffee brand built on generations of agricultural expertise and a deep-rooted passion for coffee. With ancestral roots in farming and a strong foundation in Nepal’s coffee industry, we work closely with local farmers to cultivate the finest high-altitude Arabica beans.

companies.name: Himalaya Coffee Company
companies.description: At the heart of Bloomm & Beans is our hero brand, Himalaya Coffee Company, Nepal’s trusted name in specialty coffee. Our coffee is cultivated in high altitude using terrace farming methods, resulting in high cup score and exquisite taste.

companies.name: Skyline Developers Pvt. Ltd.
companies.description: Located in the heart of Kathmandu as a joint venture between two heritage conglomerates – KL Dugar & the MC Group, Skyline Developers is a high-rise residential area that’s redefining luxury. With an aim to revolutionalise the housing scenario in the country, the residential complex which was incepted in 2020, is a melange of duplex and single story flats was built keeping in mind premium amenities such as a swimming pool, fully equipped clubhouse and interactive spaces.

companies.name: SkyOne
companies.description: Located in the heart of Kathmandu as a joint venture between two heritage conglomerates – KL Dugar & the MC Group, Skyline Developers is a high-rise residential area that’s redefining luxury. With an aim to revolutionalise the housing scenario in the country, the residential complex which was incepted in 2020, is a melange of duplex and single story flats was built keeping in mind premium amenities such as a swimming pool, fully equipped clubhouse and interactive spaces.

companies.name: The Baha
companies.description: Introducing Skyline Developers’ latest project in Sanepa – a vibrant hub of dining, shopping, and more. Explore our diverse mix of restaurants, shops, and amenities designed to enhance your lifestyle. Experience the convenience and excitement of city living at its best, right here in Sanepa.

companies.name: K L Residency
companies.description: The spectacular landmark is a melange between functional elegance and luxurious aesthetics from across the globe. Located at Bhagbati Marg, Kathmandu, these high-rise luxury apartments are the epitome of KL Dugar’s legacy of pursuing excellence.

companies.name: Orient Paradise Tours & Travels
companies.description: Orient Paradise Tours & Travels is a leading tours and travel company that specializes in providing memorable travel experiences to customers. Established in 2000, we have been offering high-quality travel services for 23 years and have become a trusted name in the industry.

companies.name: Swastik Packaging Pvt. Ltd.
companies.description: Located in Biratnagar, over two decades ago, a manufacturing unit of high-quality packaging materials was established. Over the years, the Swastik Packaging Unit has been equipped with modern machinery and cutting-edge technology from India as well as Germany. Swastik Packaging has a diverse portfolio of their clients, who hail from different industries, from FMCG to pharmaceutical companies to distilleries, edible oil refineries and various many others.
